description_long: This object is a classic AK-47 style assault rifle, featuring a combination of wood and metal construction. The stock and handguard are made of polished wood with a warm brown hue, while the receiver, barrel, and magazine are constructed from dark, matte-finished metal. The rifle has a fixed wooden stock, a curved detachable box magazine, and standard iron sights mounted on top. The barrel is long and slender, ending with a simple slotted flash hider. The overall design is robust and utilitarian, with visible mechanical components such as the charging handle and trigger guard.
description: A robust AK-47 style rifle with a wooden stock and handguard, dark metal receiver, and curved magazine.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, highlighting the wooden stock, handguard, and curved magazine.
description_view_1: Front-on view emphasizing the barrel's end, front sight, and the narrow profile of the rifle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the wooden stock, handguard, and the magazine from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear-on view focusing on the buttstock and the alignment of the receiver and barrel.
